info.title: LiveChat API
info.description: API documentation for the LiveChat platform

tags.description: Listener anchor-level progression with claimable per-level rewards

tags.description: Global search — user-facing listener discovery and full admin-level search across all users and listener profiles

dateOfBirth.description: ISO date — user must be at least 18 years old

gender.description: Required for all logins. LISTENER type must be FEMALE only.

dateOfBirth.description: Must match the dateOfBirth sent in request-otp

gender.description: Must match request-otp. LISTENER type must be FEMALE only.

inviteCode.description: Optional referral code — credits bonus coins to both users immediately on signup

post.summary: Unified login for Admin and Agent
Guest login with age verification and device ID
post.description: Creates a permanent guest account on first call. On subsequent calls with the same deviceId, restores the existing session. User must be 18+.

deviceId.description: Unique device identifier generated by the client (UUID or similar)

dateOfBirth.description: User's date of birth for 18+ age verification (ISO 8601)

inviteCode.description: Optional referral code — credits bonus coins to both users immediately on signup

200.description: Guest account created or session restored

403.description: User is under 18 or account is blocked

post.summary: Link phone number to guest account
post.description: Verifies OTP and permanently links a phone number to the guest account, upgrading it to a full account. Request OTP first via POST /auth/request-otp.

409.description: Phone number already linked to another account

post.summary: Authenticate listener directly via magic link token
post.description: Exchanges a unique magic login token for a signed JWT access token and user profile.

patch.summary: Update my settings (partial — send only the toggles to change)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of listeners under the authenticated agent's account.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free-text search across listener first/last name, username, email, and mobile number.

parameters.name: dateFrom
parameters.description: Filter listeners created on or after this date (ISO 8601). Matches the profile createdAt.

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: Filter listeners created on or before this date (ISO 8601). Matches the profile createdAt.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Country filter: accepts a Country ObjectId, ISO code (e.g. "IN"), or country name.

parameters.name: kycStatus
parameters.description: Filter by KYC verification status.

parameters.name: accountStatus
parameters.description: Account status filter: active (KYC approved & not blocked), blocked (user blocked), or pending (KYC pending).

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: Filter by the listener's anchor level (0 = no anchor level reached).

parameters.name: liveStatus
parameters.description: Filter by live presence/availability.

parameters.name: profileStatus
parameters.description: Filter by profile completion status.

parameters.name: minRevenue
parameters.description: Minimum total earnings (revenue) of the listener.

parameters.name: maxRevenue
parameters.description: Maximum total earnings (revenue) of the listener.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort by.

parameters.name: sortOrder
parameters.description: Sort direction.

post.description: Agent creates a new listener profile (as a draft/incomplete or submitted/completed status).

400.description: Email, username, or phone already in use

get.summary: Get listener stats for agent dashboard
get.description: Returns aggregated statistics (total, active, online, pending) for listeners managed by the authenticated agent.

introVideo.description: Upload intro video file (MP4, MOV, WebM up to 50MB)

interests.description: Array of strings representing listener interests

patch.description: Listener-only. Flips current availability: ONLINE → OFFLINE, any other state → ONLINE. No request body. Syncs the presence service.

200.description: Availability toggled (message reflects the new status)

get.description: Listener-only. Returns today's total earnings (session coins + gift earnings) and active minutes.

get.summary: Listener dashboard overview (period stats + growth chart)
get.description: Listener-only. Period-filtered stat cards — coins earned (sessions + gifts), total coin (current wallet balance), minutes, gifts — plus an earnings growth series (today→hourly, week→7 days, month→30 days).
Listener-only. Paginated communication sessions for the logged-in listener within the selected period.

get.summary: Get all users with filters and pagination (admin)

post.summary: Create a new Admin or Sub-Admin (admin)

roleId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the assigned Role

referralBonusCoins.description: Free coins both referrer and referred friend get when the friend first buys this pack
Free coins both referrer and referred friend get when the friend first buys this pack

get.summary: Get current user's coin transaction history
Get current user's payment transaction history

post.summary: Create a Coin Pack Purchase Order

get.summary: List and search all user wallets (Admin)
List all coin transactions across the system (Admin)
List all payment transactions across the system (Admin)

post.summary: Manually credit or debit user coins (Admin)

post.description: Follow a listener. Idempotent — duplicate follows are silently acknowledged without error.

parameters.name: listenerId
parameters.description: The User ObjectId of the listener to follow

400.description: Cannot follow yourself / Can only follow listeners

delete.description: Unfollow a listener. Returns error if not currently following.

parameters.name: listenerId
parameters.description: The User ObjectId of the listener to unfollow

400.description: You are not following this listener

get.description: Get paginated list of listeners the current user is following, with populated listener profile data.
Get paginated list of listeners the current user has marked as favourite (subset of following list).
Get paginated list of users following a specific listener.

parameters.name: listenerId
parameters.description: The User ObjectId of the listener

get.summary: Get follow counts for a user
get.description: Get follower count, following count, and whether the user is a listener. Reads from denormalized fields for O(1) performance.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The User ObjectId

get.description: Check if the current authenticated user follows a specific listener and whether they are marked as favourite.

patch.description: Toggle a followed listener as favourite/not favourite. Must already be following the listener.

400.description: You must follow this listener before marking as favourite

get.description: Analytics endpoint — returns listeners sorted by follower count in descending order.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of top listeners to return

get.description: Retrieve the main company details, links, policy documents, and logos. Publicly accessible.
List all company profiles with pagination.

post.description: Create a new company profile with custom settings, links, and policies.
Send a virtual gift to a listener (or by Admin to any user). Debits coins from sender and credits recipient.

400.description: Insufficient balance or invalid recipient/role combination

get.description: Returns stats including active gifts, total sent in last 7 days, and top 10 gifts by revenue.

get.summary: Check if a specific listener is in my wishlist
Get current user daily reward state and previews

put.summary: Update configurations for 7 days rewards cycle (Admin)
Update configurations for 4 weeks special gifts cycle (Admin)

200.description: 4 weeks special gift configurations updated successfully

post.summary: Open an unopened chest or gift from the user's inventory

parameters.name: inventoryId
parameters.description: The UserGiftInventory ObjectId

200.description: Chest opened and coins granted successfully

get.summary: Get all active avatars (annotated with isUnlocked)

post.summary: Unlock a paid avatar by spending wallet coins

parameters.name: avatarId
parameters.description: The Avatar ObjectId to unlock

post.summary: Set an unlocked (or free) avatar as profile image
post.description: Updates the authenticated user's profileImage to the selected avatar's image URL. The avatar must be FREE or already unlocked by the user.

parameters.name: avatarId
parameters.description: ID of the avatar to set as profile image

profileImage.description: URL of the new profile image

403.description: Avatar not unlocked by the user

post.summary: Initiate a new audio or video call session
post.description: Creates a CommunicationSession, sets the listener to BUSY, and returns a signed Agora RTC token plus channel info for the caller to join.

listenerId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the target listener

400.description: Validation error (invalid mode, self-call, listener offline/busy, no rate set)

409.description: Caller already in an active session

get.summary: Get or refresh Agora RTC token for an active session
get.description: Returns a fresh Agora RTC token for the requesting user. The user must be a verified participant (caller or listener) of the given session.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the active CommunicationSession

403.description: User is not a participant in this session

post.description: Ends the call, triggers final billing, resets listener availability, and cleans up Redis state.

sessionId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the session to end

400.description: Session already ended or does not exist

403.description: User is not authorised to end this session

get.summary: My anchor level, earnings, progress, and pending count (Listener)

post.description: Coins → wallet, gifts → gift inventory. Idempotent — already-claimed returns 400.

referenceId.description: Gift id — required when type is GIFT

get.summary: List all anchor levels incl. inactive (Admin)
Track claimed/unclaimed anchor rewards across listeners (Admin)

post.summary: Add a saved bank account (Bank or UPI)

get.summary: Calculate INR breakdown for a coin amount
get.description: Returns gross INR, fee, and net payout for the requested coins (for the live withdrawal UI).

post.description: Reserves coins and creates a PENDING request. Listeners draw from their earned available balance and must have kycStatus APPROVED; agents draw from their wallet coin balance (no KYC gate). Other user types receive 403.

403.description: Not a listener or agent / KYC not approved / not your payment method

get.summary: Get a withdrawal by id (owner or admin)

patch.summary: Reject a withdrawal and refund coins (Admin)

get.description: Returns the authenticated account's own notifications — customers, listeners, agents and admins each only see rows where they are the recipient. Supports filtering by status/type plus pagination.

patch.summary: Mark all my notifications as read
Mark one notification as read (owner only)

delete.summary: Delete one of my notifications (owner only)

post.summary: Send a notification to one user/listener/agent (Admin)
post.description: Admin sends a single notification to a specific recipient by id.

post.summary: Broadcast a notification to an audience (Admin)
post.description: Send to all users (CUSTOMER), all listeners (LISTENER), all agents (AGENT), or everyone (ALL, excluding admins).

body.example: Check out the new rewards screen.

get.summary: Get my referral code, link, earnings, and commission table
get.description: Returns the invite code, shareable invite link, referral stats, and the per-pack commission table (coins both users earn when a referred friend first buys each pack).

post.summary: Apply a referral code after signup
post.description: Links the accounts. Customer-only. The bonus is paid to BOTH users when the referred friend makes their first coin purchase (amount depends on the pack). Can only be used once per account.

200.description: Referral linked — bonus unlocks on first coin purchase

400.description: Invalid code, own code, already referred, or non-customer account

post.description: Any authenticated user (CUSTOMER / LISTENER / ADMIN) can submit feedback about the app.

get.description: Admin-only. Paginated with filters.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search within message text

get.summary: Get a feedback by id (owner or admin)

put.summary: Update your feedback (owner, while status is OPEN)

post.summary: Create or update a review for a listener
post.description: Requires the customer to have at least one COMPLETED session with the listener. One review per user per listener (upsert).

400.description: No completed session with this listener

get.summary: Get paginated reviews for a listener

get.description: Users see only active categories (cached). Admins get all categories with full filter control.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by category name

parameters.name: isActive
parameters.description: Admin only — filter by active status

get.summary: Get a sticker category by id

delete.description: Fails with 400 if any stickers still belong to the category.

patch.summary: Toggle a sticker category active status (Admin)

get.description: Users see only active stickers (cached). Admins get all stickers. Filter by category and search by name/tags.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by sticker name or tags

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Filter by category id

parameters.name: unlockType
parameters.description: Filter by unlock type

parameters.name: isActive
parameters.description: Admin only — filter by active status

200.description: Stickers fetched successfully. For non-admin users each sticker includes `isUnlocked` (and `levelsToUnlock` for LEVEL stickers).

post.description: unlockType controls access: FREE (everyone), PAID (requires `price` coins, user unlocks via POST /stickers/{id}/unlock), LEVEL (auto-unlocks at `requiredLevel`).

price.description: Coin cost — required (>0) when unlockType is PAID

requiredLevel.description: Min user level — required (>=2) when unlockType is LEVEL

post.summary: Unlock (purchase) a PAID sticker with coins
post.description: Deducts the sticker's coin price from the user's wallet and adds it to their unlocked stickers. Fails for FREE stickers (no purchase needed) and LEVEL stickers (auto-unlock by level).

400.description: Free/level sticker, already unlocked, or insufficient balance

get.summary: Get current user's XP & level progression profile
Get paginated personal XP transaction log
Get my reward inventory (claimable level-up rewards)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter rewards by claim status. Omit for all.

post.summary: Claim a single reward from the inventory
post.description: Applies the reward to the user's account (coins, avatar, gift, badge) and marks it CLAIMED. Claiming is idempotent — an already-claimed reward returns 400.

parameters.name: inventoryId
parameters.description: The RewardHistory inventory item id

400.description: Reward already claimed or not found

post.summary: Manually grant XP to a user (admin)

get.description: Lets any authenticated user discover listeners by name, country, language, category, and availability. Only returns KYC-approved, non-deleted, non-blocked listener profiles.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Keyword to match against listener first name, last name, or full name (case-insensitive)

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: ISO country code filter on the listener's user account (e.g. IN, US, GB)

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Filter by language. Accepts a Language ObjectId, language name (e.g. Hindi), or ISO code (e.g. HI)

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by listener category

parameters.name: availability
parameters.description: Filter by current availability status

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results per page

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort results by (e.g. avgRating, followersCount, chatRate)

parameters.name: sortOrder
parameters.description: Sort direction

get.description: Full-power search across all Users and Listener Profiles. Supports filtering by name, email, mobile, country, language, user type, KYC status, availability, blocked/deleted status, registration date range, earnings range, and minimum rating. ADMIN role required.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Keyword matched against first name, last name, full name, email, and mobile number (case-insensitive)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by user account type

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: ISO country code (e.g. IN, US, GB)

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Language ObjectId, name (e.g. Hindi), or ISO code (e.g. HI)

parameters.name: gender
parameters.description: Filter by gender

parameters.name: isBlocked
parameters.description: Filter blocked / non-blocked users

parameters.name: isDeleted
parameters.description: Include soft-deleted users (omit to return all)

parameters.name: dateFrom
parameters.description: Registration date range start (ISO 8601, inclusive)

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: Registration date range end (ISO 8601, inclusive)

parameters.name: kycStatus
parameters.description: (Listener profiles only) Filter by KYC verification status

parameters.name: availability
parameters.description: (Listener profiles only) Filter by availability status

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: (Listener profiles only) Filter by listener category

parameters.name: minEarnings
parameters.description: (Listener profiles only) Minimum totalEarnings (coins) on listener profile

parameters.name: maxEarnings
parameters.description: (Listener profiles only) Maximum totalEarnings (coins) on listener profile

parameters.name: minRating
parameters.description: (Listener profiles only) Minimum average rating

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results per page

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort results by

parameters.name: sortOrder
parameters.description: Sort direction

listenerLanguageDetails.description: Languages from the listener profile (may differ from user.languages)

get.description: Returns the home-screen list of active listeners a user can browse. "Active" means KYC-approved listeners whose user account is neither deleted nor blocked/disabled by an admin. Supports keyword search and filters by language, country, status, and rating, with pagination. Results are Redis-cached (60s) and version-invalidated for fast responses.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Keyword to match against listener first name, last name, or full name (case-insensitive)

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Filter by language. Accepts a Language ObjectId, language name (e.g. Hindi), or ISO code (e.g. HI)

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: ISO country code filter on the listener user account (e.g. IN, US, GB)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by current availability status

parameters.name: minRating
parameters.description: Minimum average rating (0-5)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort mode. featured = promoted first then most-followed/top-rated; popular = most followers/sessions; rating = highest rated; newest = recently joined

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results per page (max 50)

403.description: Forbidden - only CUSTOMER or LISTENER accounts may access the home feed

get.description: Returns online, new, and popular customer sections for the logged-in listener. Online users are interacted customers currently online. New users have never chatted or called this listener. Popular users are ranked by currentLevel and totalXp. Presence is overlaid from Redis in real time. Socket events listener_home_presence and listener_home_interaction push live updates.

parameters.name: section
parameters.description: Return a single section only (omit for all three)

get.description: Returns admin-configured instant match fee and whether the feature is enabled. No wallet debit.

post.description: One-click match: debits admin-configured instantMatchFee on successful match (not on 404). No re-charge within 5-min sticky window. Does not start a session — use socket request_chat or POST /calls/initiate afterward.

mode.description: Wallet pre-check rate mode for session

refresh.description: Skip sticky match and fee-paid window

200.description: Partner matched; includes matchFeeCharged, balanceAfter, instantMatchFee

402.description: Insufficient wallet balance for match fee or session rate

404.description: No suitable partner available (no fee debited)

409.description: Customer already in an active session

get.description: Quick check whether any ONLINE partner exists for the customer. No wallet debit.

Paginated listener discovery for customers. Defaults to the customer's country (`sameCountry=true`). Sort modes: combined (anchor level + rating), rating, anchor_level, featured, popular. Mongo results are Redis-cached (60s, version-invalidated); live availability is batch-overlaid from Redis presence on every response.

schema.description: Retry without country filter when the first page is empty

200.description: Paginated listener list with appliedFilters metadata

get.summary: Revenue by source chart and breakdown

200.description: Period report with stats and chart data

get.summary: Agent dashboard KPI cards with period-over-period trends

200.description: Listener growth, revenue, commission, and daily active charts
